response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of staff-level software engineering experience with TypeScript, cloud (AWS CDK), and notably direct MCP code generator and agentic workflow infrastructure work at re:cinq — all of which map to key technologies in this role. However, Python is absent from his listed skills despite being a primary language requirement, and the resume contains no mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation and optimization techniques. His AI and agentic experience appears concentrated in his current role starting April 2025, falling well short of the 8+ years of production-grade AI solutions the position demands.
strengths: Direct Model Context Protocol (MCP) development and agentic workflow infrastructure experience at re:cinq aligns precisely with listed key technologies
Proven staff-level engineering across diverse stacks with TypeScript and AWS CDK in production environments
History of public knowledge-sharing via conference talks and multi-day workshops demonstrates the mentorship and technical leadership responsibilities required
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills section despite being a primary required language for GenAI solution development
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance metrics and optimization — all core technical requirements
AI and agentic experience is effectively limited to one role beginning April 2025, far below the 8+ year production AI seniority threshold

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and core GenAI stack (RAG, vector DBs, LLM tuning)
MCP and agentic workflow hands-on experience
